content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Implemented bead claiming flow: claim_bead_in_br() calls `br update <bead_id> --status=in_progress` with sync flush before project creation. handle_create_from_bead() gates project creation on successful claim — failure transitions controller to NeedsOperator. After project creation, sync_controller_task_claimed() records the linked project ID in the controller. Controller's same-state sync for Claimed now supports task_id adoption (None→Some). Idempotent retry handles already-in_progress beads gracefully. Five deterministic tests cover success, failure, idempotent retry, NeedsOperator transition, and task_id recording.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Implement claim_bead_in_br() function in src/cli/project.rs that calls BrMutationAdapter::update_bead_status(bead_id, 'in_progress') followed by sync_flush(), with idempotent retry when bead is already in_progress
2. [Completed] Wire claim_bead_in_br() into handle_create_from_bead() before project creation, with NeedsOperator transition on failure via sync_controller_state
3. [Completed] Add sync_controller_task_claimed() call after successful project creation to record linked project ID (task_id) in milestone controller
4. [Completed] Update controller's same_state_context_error_details() to allow task_id adoption (None→Some) in Claimed state, and change sync_controller_task_claimed Claimed branch to use sync_existing_state_locked for durable journal events
5. [Completed] Add test: claim_bead_in_br_succeeds_on_update_and_sync — verifies successful br update + sync flow
6. [Completed] Add test: claim_bead_in_br_fails_when_update_exits_nonzero_and_bead_not_in_progress — verifies error propagation on non-idempotent failure
7. [Completed] Add test: claim_bead_in_br_succeeds_idempotently_when_already_in_progress — verifies idempotent retry when bead already claimed
8. [Completed] Add test: claim_failure_transitions_controller_to_needs_operator — verifies controller moves to NeedsOperator with reason on claim failure
9. [Completed] Add test: successful_claim_records_task_id_in_controller — verifies sync_controller_task_claimed persists both bead_id and task_id
10. [Completed] Add test: sync_task_claimed_adopts_task_id_when_claimed_without_one — verifies controller unit-level task_id adoption in Claimed state
11. [Completed] Update 14 existing CLI test fixtures to handle br update and br sync subcommands so existing tests continue passing
12. [Completed] Run cargo test — 757 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored (lib+integration)
13. [Completed] Verify all 19 clippy errors are pre-existing on base commit a5a6aaeb — no new violations introduced by this change

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test: 757 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored across lib and integration tests
- cargo fmt --check: clean (no formatting issues)
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings: 19 errors, all pre-existing (verified identical error set on base commit a5a6aaeb via git stash + re-run)
- claim_bead_in_br_succeeds_on_update_and_sync: passes — verifies br update + sync_flush flow
- claim_bead_in_br_fails_when_update_exits_nonzero_and_bead_not_in_progress: passes — verifies error message contains bead ID
- claim_bead_in_br_succeeds_idempotently_when_already_in_progress: passes — verifies fallback check of bead status
- claim_failure_transitions_controller_to_needs_operator: passes — verifies controller state=NeedsOperator with 'br claim failed' reason
- successful_claim_records_task_id_in_controller: passes — verifies controller persists bead_id='bead-link-1' and task_id='project-from-bead'
- sync_task_claimed_adopts_task_id_when_claimed_without_one: passes — verifies None→Some(task_id) adoption in Claimed state

## Outstanding Risks

- All 19 clippy errors are pre-existing (verified identical on base commit a5a6aaeb); no new clippy violations introduced but they remain unfixed in the broader codebase
